name: Font settings: Check of text theme
fullName: Read EPUB in Palace Bookshelf: Font settings: Check of text theme

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I open Catalog
And  I open search modal
And  I search for 'Flower Fables' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Click GET action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
And  I scroll page forward from 7 to 9 times
And  I open font settings
And  I change contrast to BLACK_TEXT_ON_WHITE
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_WHITE background is correct
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_WHITE background is correct
When  I return to previous screen from epub
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_WHITE background is correct
When  I open font settings
And  I change contrast to BLACK_TEXT_ON_SEPIA
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_SEPIA background is correct
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_SEPIA background is correct
When  I return to previous screen from epub
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The BLACK_TEXT_ON_SEPIA background is correct
When  I open font settings
And  I change contrast to WHITE_TEXT_ON_BLACK
Then  The WHITE_TEXT_ON_BLACK background is correct
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The WHITE_TEXT_ON_BLACK background is correct
When  I return to previous screen from epub
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  The WHITE_TEXT_ON_BLACK background is correct

labels.name: story
labels.value: Font settings: Check of text theme

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Font settings: Check of text theme
